visual_analysis: The application features a sleek and modern design with a dark background that enhances the visibility of the bright bar graph. The use of glowing elements and a well-organized layout provides a visually appealing experience, though it could benefit from even more clarity in labeling.
educational_analysis: While the visualization effectively represents the bubble sort algorithm, the educational value is somewhat limited by the lack of detailed instructional elements or clear learning objectives. The presence of only basic buttons and the descriptive title does not fully engage users in understanding the sorting process.
